Examples.Title: Execute a Blueprint
Examples.Description: Execute a Blueprint Version with custom node inputs. This endpoint triggers the execution of the specified Blueprint Version and returns a Blueprint Execution ID to track the job.
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Leonardo;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Get Blueprint by ID
Examples.Description: Returns a single Blueprint by its akUUID
Examples.Code:
### Get Blueprint by ID
# @name getBlueprintById
GET {{host}}/blueprints/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successfully retrieved Blueprint
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Blueprint Execution by ID
Examples.Description: Retrieves details of a specific Blueprint Execution by its akUUID
Examples.Code:
### Get Blueprint Execution by ID
# @name getBlueprintExecution
GET {{host}}/blueprint-executions/{{id}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successfully retrieved Blueprint Execution
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Blueprint Execution Generations by Execution ID
Examples.Description: Retrieves paginated generations for a specific Blueprint Execution, including their statuses and any prompt moderation failure details.
Examples.Code:
### Get Blueprint Execution Generations by Execution ID
# @name getBlueprintExecutionGenerations
GET {{host}}/blueprint-executions/{{id}}/generations?first={{first}}&after={{after}}&last={{last}}&before={{before}}
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successfully retrieved Blueprint Execution Generations
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Blueprint Versions by Blueprint ID
Examples.Description: Returns all versions of a Blueprint by its akUUID
Examples.Code:
### Get Blueprint Versions by Blueprint ID
# @name getBlueprintVersionsByBlueprintId
GET {{host}}/blueprints/{{id}}/versions
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Successfully retrieved Blueprint Versions
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: List Blueprints
Examples.Description: Returns a list of Blueprints. Use either forward pagination (first/after) or backward pagination (last/before), but not both. Note: This endpoint uses a request body to support complex filtering parameters
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Leonardo;` is in scope and `apiKey` contains the required credential.

Examples.Title: Train a Custom Element
Examples.Description: This endpoint will train a new custom element.
Examples.Code:
### Train a Custom Element
# @name createElement
POST {{host}}/elements
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "placeholder",
  "description": "",
  "datasetId": "",
  "instance_prompt": "",
  "lora_focus": "string",
  "train_text_encoder": true,
  "resolution": 1024,
  "sd_version": "FLUX_DEV",
  "num_train_epochs": 0,
  "learning_rate": 0
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Responses for POST /elements.
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Create a Generation of Images
Examples.Description: This endpoint will generate images
Examples.Code:
### Create a Generation of Images
# @name createGeneration

Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "alchemy": true,
  "contrastRatio": 0,
  "contrast": 3.5,
  "controlnets": [
    {
      "initImageId": "string",
      "initImageType": "GENERATED",
      "preprocessorId": 0,
      "weight": 0,
      "strengthType": "Low"
    }
  ],
  "elements": [
    {
      "akUUID": "string",
      "weight": 1.0
    }
  ],
  "userElements": [
    {
      "userLoraId": 0,
      "weight": 0
    }
  ],
  "expandedDomain": true,
  "fantasyAvatar": true,
  "guidance_scale": 0,
  "height": 768,
  "highContrast": true,
  "highResolution": true,
  "imagePrompts": [
    "string"
  ],
  "imagePromptWeight": 0,
  "init_generation_image_id": "string",
  "init_image_id": "string",
  "init_strength": 0,
  "modelId": "b24e16ff-06e3-43eb-8d33-4416c2d75876",
  "negative_prompt": "string",
  "num_images": 4,
  "num_inference_steps": 0,
  "photoReal": true,
  "photoRealVersion": "string",
  "photoRealStrength": 0,
  "presetStyle": "DYNAMIC",
  "prompt": "A majestic cat in the snow",
  "promptMagic": true,
  "promptMagicStrength": 0,
  "promptMagicVersion": "string",
  "public": true,
  "scheduler": "KLMS",
  "sd_version": "v1_5",
  "seed": 0,
  "tiling": true,
  "transparency": "disabled",
  "ultra": true,
  "unzoom": true,
  "unzoomAmount": 0,
  "upscaleRatio": 0,
  "width": 1024,
  "controlNet": true,
  "controlNetType": "POSE",
  "weighting": 0,
  "canvasRequest": true,
  "canvasRequestType": "INPAINT",
  "canvasInitId": "string",
  "canvasMaskId": "string",
  "enhancePrompt": true,
  "enhancePromptInstruction": "string"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Responses for POST /generations
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Train a Custom Model
Examples.Description: This endpoint will train a new custom model
Examples.Code:
### Train a Custom Model
# @name createModel
POST {{host}}/models
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "name": "string",
  "description": "",
  "datasetId": "string",
  "instance_prompt": "string",
  "modelType": "GENERAL",
  "nsfw": false,
  "resolution": 512,
  "sd_version": "v1_5",
  "strength": "MEDIUM"
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Responses for POST /models
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Create a video generation from an image
Examples.Description: This endpoint will generate a video using an uploaded or generated image.
Examples.Code:
### Create a video generation from an image
# @name createImageToVideoGeneration
POST {{host}}/generations-image-to-video
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "prompt": "string",
  "imageId": "string",
  "imageType": "GENERATED",
  "endFrameImage": {
    "id": "string",
    "type": "GENERATED"
  },
  "resolution": "RESOLUTION_480",
  "model": "MOTION2",
  "frameInterpolation": true,
  "isPublic": true,
  "seed": 0,
  "negativePrompt": "string",
  "promptEnhance": true,
  "duration": 0,
  "promptEnhanceInstruction": "string",
  "styleIds": [
    "string"
  ],
  "elements": [
    {
      "akUUID": "string",
      "weight": 1.0
    }
  ],
  "height": 0,
  "width": 0
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Responses for POST /generations-image-to-video
# Content-Type: application/json

  "prompt": "string",
  "similarity": 0,
  "ultraUpscaleStyle": "ARTISTIC",
  "upscaleMultiplier": 1.5,
  "upscalerStyle": "GENERAL",
  "variationId": "string"
}
